endpoint_schema.title: Pipelines
endpoint_schema.description: Returns an array of sales pipeline objects from the Pipedrive account

id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline

url_title.description: The URL-friendly title of the pipeline used in the Pipedrive web app URL

order_nr.description: The order number of the pipeline in the pipeline list. Defines the display order in the UI

active.description: Whether the pipeline is active (true) or inactive/archived (false)

deal_probability.description: Whether deal probability is enabled for this pipeline. When enabled, each stage can have a probability percentage

add_time.description: The creation date and time of the pipeline in UTC (e.g., 2023-01-15 10:30:00)

update_time.description: The last update date and time of the pipeline in UTC (e.g., 2023-06-20 14:45:00)

selected.description: Whether this pipeline is currently selected as the default pipeline for the authenticated user
